title: Grilled Venezuelan Crisp Tacos
description: A flavorful twist on traditional tacos, featuring crispy venezuelan flatbread and topped with fresh ingredients.

ingredients.name: Venezuelan flatbread (crisp)
ingredients.notes: available in most Latin American grocery stores or online

instructions: Grill venezuelan flatbread for 2-3 minutes per side, or until crispy.
Grill corn for 5-7 minutes, turning frequently, or until lightly charred.
Chop cilantro and red onion, if using.
Assemble tacos by placing grilled flatbread on a plate, topping with grilled corn, avocado, cilantro, and red onion, if using.
Serve with sour cream on the side, if desired.
